urdu transliteration text:
Ab To Ajao Shahan Shahe Wafa
PLEASE COME BACK OH KING OF LOYALTY
@HujjatELC
Ab To Ajao Shahan Shahe Wafa - Please come back oh King of Loyalty

Roro Kehti Thi Sakina Ranme
Lutgayi Saniye Zehra Ki Rida
“THEY HAVE TAKEN AWAY BIBI ZAINAB’S VEIL”
@HujjatELC
Ab To Ajao Shahan Shahe Wafa - Please come back oh King of Loyalty
english translation text: SAKINA CRIED AND SAID FROM THE DESERT,

SHIMR HAS SLAPPED MY CHEEKS,
THEY HAVE PICKED ME UP WITH FORCE,
THEY DID NOT LET ME CRY OVER MY FATHER’S BODY

THEY SNATCHED ALL OUR VEILS AND BURNT OUR TENTS
THE WAY THEY HAVE LOOTED THE MUSLIMS IN THIS WAY
THEY DIDN’T THINK WE ARE FROM NABI’S FAMILY

YOU HAD A LOT OF FAITH IN THE STRENGTH OF ABBAS,
THAT HE WOULD SAVE YOU FROM BEING IMPRISONED,
…SHIMR HAD SAID THIS TO ZAINAB

THE CARAVAN THAT IS READY TO GO TO SHAAM
THERE IS A NEW BRIDE IN THERE AS WELL
THE COLOUR OF HENA HAS NOT LEFT HER HANDS

urdu transliteration text:
Tor Di Maar Ke Akbar Ke Jigar Me BarchhiAur Sitamgar Ne Kaha Mola SeYe Suna Hai Ke Tu Sabir Hai Bara
AFTER BREAKING THE SPEAR TIP IN AKBAR’S HEART
THE ASSASSIN THEN TAUNTED MOLA HUSSAIN
@HujjatELC
Ab To Ajao Shahan Shahe Wafa - Please come back oh King of Loyalty
english translation text: SAYING, CAN YOUR PATIENCE BEAR THIS TRAGEDY?

urdu transliteration text:
Sahibul Asr Ye Alfaaz Ata Karte HaiKoi Khoobi Ye Nahin Akhtar KiIss Ke Nawho Me Hai Zehra Ki Dua
IMAM ZAMANA IS SAYING
WITHOUT THE DUA OF BIBI FATEMA
@HujjatELC
Ab To Ajao Shahan Shahe Wafa - Please come back oh King of Loyalty
english translation text: THERE IS NO WEIGHT IN “AKHTAR’S” WORDS
